name: The Asylum
description:
"Welcome to St. Aelred Psychiatric Institute"

Warning: Possible blood, murder, rape, foreplay, racism, strong mockery, mentions of the Nazi regime and/or the Holocaust

One complaint was enough to condemn you for the rest of your life, You don't even know who it could have been. A neighbor? A completely random person? Or maybe there was no report and they arrested you because they could. You really don't know. But at this point it doesn't matter anymore, you're in hell, or well, the closest thing to hell you'll ever know while you're still alive.
creator: I'm Koda Satō
